title: E-Deck Gate Key Ring
description: Hanging on a numbered hook in the assistant purser's station on E-Deck, a brass key ring labeled 'E-DECK FWD PROMENADE — THIRD CLASS SEPARATION' holds the padlock key for the gate currently trapping Third Class passengers below the boat deck. The hook is in plain sight on a board with twenty other key rings, but this one has been deliberately turned face-inward to blend into the backing board — the label is not visible unless you reach for it.
